question.label: Thread follow
question.name: still enough substantive — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing condition — clearer ownership boundaries so Lin is not the default escalation — signalling sustained strain, reduced ownership quality, and lack of growth-support; also reveals a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Delegation boundary
new_queue.name: What work are you still holding that someone else could own?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
